title: Ship the viewer server as a separate globally-installed package; sessions detect or connect to it
description: Once EXEC-054 validates the in-repo auto-run server, extract it into its own package installed globally (separate from the to-execution Scaffolder package). Individual execution repos/sessions check whether the global server exists and connect to it instead of each running their own — one server, many Instances. Same hard requirements: lightweight, fast-running, zero/near-zero dependencies. Needs design decisions (port/discovery convention, multi-repo serving, version skew between server and Instances) — grill before implementation.
acceptance_criteria: One globally-installed server on a well-known port serves every registered repo at a stable URL
SessionStart hooks register the repo instead of spawning a per-repo server when the global server is present
Viewer assets served from the repo, not the package (version-skew policy per ADR-0007)
Idle/orphan and lockdown guarantees of EXEC-054 hold
notes: Filed 2026-06-10 (Brooks). Step 2 of the viewer-server track; acceptance criteria set after EXEC-054 validates and a grill resolves discovery/packaging. Re-identified from EXEC-047 on 2026-06-10: the original id collided with a PRD-007 hook slice filed in a parallel session; sprint-4 close gate caught the lineage mismatch.
